summary: Iteration 12 fully verified end-to-end. Backend: 10/10 pytest passed covering SHEIN PDF extractor (126 line items, all top fields exact match), packing-list generation with full shipping metadata + persistence + re-download, merged packing list (same-client OK, sectioned mode produces valid xlsx, cross-client rejected with 400), auto-pick template via alias (uploads + auto-picks marker template + falls back to default after delete), and regression on synthetic xlsx + smoke endpoints. Frontend: Production packing modal opens with all 14 fields, submit calls POST /api/packing-lists/job (200) and downloads xlsx; Merge-Packing button appears after select-<key> checkbox; Archive view renders 20 saved packing-list rows with re-download triggering GET /api/packing-lists/{id}/file successfully; Settings packing templates upload/delete CRUD works end-to-end.
passed: POST /api/pos/extract (SHEIN PDF /tmp/newpo.pdf): po_number=5155396467, client_name='NEXTGEN', vendor='SSK FOOTCARE', po_date=2026-03-24, delivery_date=2026-06-20, grand_total=512925, total_quantity=2100, line_items=126
Spot-check line: RRL-SH-10002 / BLACK / size 3 -> description has 'SHEIN'+'WOMEN', hsn=64039990, qty=10, unit_price=235, amount=2350, mrp starts with '399'

POST /api/packing-lists/job with full shipping options -> xlsx includes row 15 with DISPATCH/TRANSPORTER/VEHICLE/DRIVER, plus concrete values (XPRESS LOGISTICS, MH04AB1234, RAJU PATIL, ST-9981, JNPT/NHAVA, notes block 'HANDLE WITH CARE'); X-Packing-List-Id header set
GET /api/packing-lists -> includes newly-created PL; file_b64 stripped from listing payload
GET /api/packing-lists/{id}/file -> bytes length matches original; xlsx loads in openpyxl
POST /api/packing-lists/merged with 2 same-client job_ids + sectioned=true -> 200 with valid xlsx and X-Packing-List-Id header

Auto-pick: upload template with alias=<first word of client>, POST /api/packing-lists/job without template_id -> generated xlsx A1 contains the unique marker 'ZZ_TEST_TEMPLATE_MARKER_42'. After DELETE, regeneration no longer contains marker (fallback to default)
Regression: /tmp/test_po.xlsx -> po=2220008835 SIYARAM with 3 line items

Frontend /production: packing-btn-<key> on dispatched card opens packing-dialog; all 14 testids (pl-pcs-per-box, pl-carton-dim, pl-net-wt, pl-gross-wt, pl-dispatch-date, pl-transporter, pl-vehicle, pl-driver-name, pl-driver-phone, pl-site-code, pl-destination, pl-port, pl-notes, pl-submit) present and editable
Frontend submit: pl-submit -> POST /api/packing-lists/job (200) + browser download 'PackingList-2220010098-ZFLWWFLT07275-CREAM.xlsx'
Frontend merge: selecting 1 'select-<key>' merge checkbox shows green 'MERGE PACKING (N)' button with data-testid='merged-packing-btn'
Frontend Archive (2) toggle -> 20 redownload-pl-<id> rows; clicking first re-download triggers download 'PackingList-2220010098-2026-06-26.xlsx'
Frontend /settings packing templates: upload test_po.xlsx -> POST /api/packing-templates 200, pt-row-<id> appears; pt-delete-<id> -> DELETE 200, row count -> 0

ui_bugs.issue: data-testid attribute is not being forwarded to the rendered DOM element (querySelector by this testid returns null). Children testids (redownload-pl-<id> etc.) render correctly and functionality works fine. Likely caused by an intermediate React wrapper not forwarding the prop.

Same as above - wrapper testid missing in DOM, but pt-client-name/pt-name/pt-aliases/pt-file-input/pt-upload/pt-empty/pt-list/pt-row-<id>/pt-delete-<id> all render correctly. Functional flow (upload + delete) works.

action_items: Optional (LOW): investigate why <Card data-testid='saved-packing-lists'> and <Card data-testid='packing-templates-section'> wrappers do not get the testid attribute in the live DOM despite Card spreading {...props}. Likely an extra wrapper div, or React 19/Slot consuming the data-testid. Children testids work, so functional tests are unaffected. Could add data-testid to a plain <div> wrapper instead of the Card itself.
critical_code_review_comments: po_extractor_free.py SHEIN extraction looks robust: 126/126 lines, color+size split from comma-separated description works correctly. No issues.
server.py now exceeds 2400 lines - strongly recommend splitting into modules (pos, packing, production, invoices, reports, payroll, auth) for maintainability. Same comment as iteration 11.
packing_lists collection stores file_b64 inline; for very large generated xlsx files this could bloat the Mongo doc beyond 16MB. Consider GridFS or external object storage for files >5MB.
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted: 1 packing template (TEST_FE_CLIENT / TEST_FE_TEMPLATE via frontend) and 1 auto-pick template (ZZ_TEST_AUTO_PICK via backend). Generated and persisted multiple packing lists via the backend test (single + merged). Production jobs were already in dispatched state - tests are idempotent and don't change job stages further. Final state clean.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 12 deliverables verified: SHEIN PDF extractor, packing-list shipping/manual fields + persistence + re-download, merged packing list, auto-pick by alias, frontend modals and settings CRUD. Run: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_iteration12.py -v. Two low-priority wrapper data-testids missing in DOM (saved-packing-lists, packing-templates-section) - children testids work fine; do NOT block on this.
